completed: Retroactive template sync (new items and updates)

decisions.context: Matrix column keys for co-curricular items were colliding
decisions.decision: Switched to using itemTypeId as the matrix key for all co-curricular columns
decisions.trade_offs: Requires slightly more logic in student portal to map snapshots correctly

decisions.decision: Implemented retroactive sync to active batches to ensure data consistency
decisions.trade_offs: Bulk writes to NodueApproval and NodueRequest can be expensive but are necessary for consistency
